redGreenRefactorEvidence.failingTestEvidence: ProductionReadClientFactory lacked create_resources; product/return paths used unverified API versions
redGreenRefactorEvidence.passingTestEvidence: 9 fixture-backed Layer 1 tests pass via ProductionReadClientFactory

implementationSummary: Issue #297: migrated Layer 1 read paths to verified Fujiwa contracts (product 202309, order detail 202507, return/refund search 202602); added Pydantic schema validation on all seven read resources; introduced ProductionReadResources factory accessor for Fujiwa production-read client only; one fixture-backed pytest per resource.
assumptions: Blockers #295 and #296 are merged — production-read guards and credential isolation already in place
OrdersSearchData schema is sufficient for order detail responses (same orders[] envelope)
Inventory search and affiliate creators remain out of scope for this issue's minimum set
risks: Sandbox write approve/reject paths still reference 202309 while search uses 202602 — unchanged, Layer 2 scope
endpoints.md migration note for PRODUCT_API_VERSION still documents pre-migration state until docs slice
